title: Desire Paths
description:
A mod that will slowly convert a grass block into a desire path block and eventually a dirt path block when repeatedly stepped on.

Now configurable! Just open the config file and change the Step Count Maximum, Step Count for Low Height, and Step Resetter!
body:
# For those who have the desire to make their own path, get to steppin'!

This mod aims to let the player naturally carve a path in their world. It will slowly convert a grass block into a desire path block and eventually a dirt path block when repeatedly stepped on. This not only works for the player, but villagers too!

As the block is stepped on, it converts from a grass block into a desire path block. If stepped on enough, it will convert into a dirt path. If you don't step on the desire path block for a long time, it will eventually regrow back into a grass block.  Once it is a dirt path, it will stay that way until broken, just like vanilla dirt paths!



This is my first real attempt at a Minecraft mod. I hope you enjoy! :)



- Currently only supporting 1.21.3 and 1.21.4 with Fabric 0.16.9+
